summary.en: Grid-connected PV inverters for Turkish projects should be documented for anti-islanding and loss-of-mains protection as part of the distribution-company and project acceptance file. IEC 62116 and EN 50549-series evidence may be relevant technical evidence, but the required settings and accepted standard route must be confirmed with the local Turkish grid-connection authority for the project.
summary.zh: 用于土耳其项目的并网光伏逆变器，应在配电公司和项目验收文件中提供防孤岛及失电网保护证据。IEC 62116 和 EN 50549 系列证据可能是相关技术证据，但所需参数和可接受标准路径必须由项目所在地土耳其并网主管方确认。
summary.zht: 用於土耳其專案的併網光伏逆變器，應在配電公司和專案驗收文件中提供防孤島及失電網保護證據。IEC 62116 和 EN 50549 系列證據可能是相關技術證據，但所需參數和可接受標準路徑必須由專案所在地土耳其併網主管方確認。

summary.en: China anti-islanding and abnormal-grid tests under GB/T 37408 and grid-code work under GB/T 19964-2024 can support comparison, but trip thresholds, reconnection times, and loss-of-mains methods must be matched to the Turkish project requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB/T 37408 的防孤岛及异常电网测试，以及 GB/T 19964-2024 并网规范工作可支持比较，但跳闸阈值、重连时间和失电网方法必须匹配土耳其项目要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB/T 37408 的防孤島及異常電網測試，以及 GB/T 19964-2024 併網規範工作可支持比較，但跳脫閾值、重連時間和失電網方法必須匹配土耳其專案要求。

gap.en: The gap is setting compatibility and evidence traceability. Exporters should provide anti-islanding type-test reports, firmware version control, parameter-locking method, voltage and frequency trip tables, reconnection logic, commissioning screenshots, and a statement that Turkish project settings override default China profiles.
gap.zh: 差距在于参数兼容性和证据可追溯性。出口商应提供防孤岛型式试验报告、固件版本控制、参数锁定方法、电压和频率跳闸表、重连逻辑、调试截图，并说明土耳其项目参数优先于中国默认配置。
gap.zht: 差距在於參數相容性和證據可追溯性。出口商應提供防孤島型式試驗報告、韌體版本控制、參數鎖定方法、電壓和頻率跳脫表、重連邏輯、調試截圖，並說明土耳其專案參數優先於中國預設配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Turkish grid-connection or project acceptance requires anti-islanding and loss-of-mains protection; exact standard and settings are project-specific unless incorporated by the authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific under Chinese grid rules, but not accepted as a substitute for Turkish project settings

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Anti-islanding evidence should be treated as a Turkish project grid-acceptance item; China default trip settings and GB/T evidence need a Turkish parameter review before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 防孤岛证据应作为土耳其项目并网验收事项处理；中国默认跳闸参数和 GB/T 证据在投运前需要进行土耳其参数审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 防孤島證據應作為土耳其專案併網驗收事項處理；中國預設跳脫參數和 GB/T 證據在投運前需要進行土耳其參數審查。
